form.formComment: First starter by Nicconi out of Diamond Grace. Has a total of eight trials prior to his debut today. Tough assignment.

form.formComment: Most recently 5th of 8 at Warracknabeal Mdn-Sw on April 4 over 1200m, 2.25 len behind Yes Chicci with 59kg at $3.90. Before that 6th of 11 at Edenhope Mdn-Sw on March 7 over 1450m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Shay's Way with 59kg at $3.10. Hard to have.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Three-wide throughout. Laid inward in the home straight.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months 4th of 8 at Kyneton 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1208m, slow going 3.5 len behind Bluey Merchant carrying 58kg at $8.50. Previously second-up eased back early on 6th of 11 at Bendigo 3yo Mdn-Sw on October 5 over 1300m, 7 len behind Heiwana Tamashi with 58kg at $101. Rates well and should improve.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly, shifted in and bumped Graceys Gossip.

form.formComment: At debut, sat behind the speed prior to fading second last of 9 at Ararat 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 3 over 1200m, slow going 6 len behind Corro carrying 58kg at $8.50. Drawn awkwardly today and is not likely to feature.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 3rd of 9 at Geelong Mdn-Sw on April 1 over 1400m, head behind Fastobeast carrying 59kg at $3.40. The run before that raced on speed throughout when 3rd of 7 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw on March 10 over 1500m, 2 len behind Antalian with 59kg at $4. Strong winning chance.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when 5th of 10 at Geelong 3yo Mdn-Sw on December 12 over 1530m, 4 len behind Storm Leopard with 58kg at $20. Has claims if presented on song.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up second last of 10 at Caulfield Heath 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 4 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Melian carrying 58kg at $71. Last start made ground from midfield; 3rd of 12 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1412m, 0.8 len behind Winter Nights carrying 59kg at $4. Racing well. Heading the right way and gets his chance to get off the mark.

The run before that made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 11 at Swan Hill Mdn-Sw on March 15 over 1300m, 0.8 len behind Monix with 57kg at $4.60. Tested in this line-up.
